Details:
Effective removal was seen by using ultraviolet irradiation and hydrogen peroxide under the conditions evaluated.
Increase in hydrogen peroxide dosage did not significantly increase the degradation percentage.  Higher pH (10) inhibited the degradation as compared to a neutral or acidic medium [763].
In one reference, complete degradation was achieved in less than 5 minutes using 5 mg/l ferrous ions as a catalyst (photo-Fenton reaction).
